features.name: EPS File Preview
features.description: Renders Encapsulated PostScript (EPS) files directly inside Datagrok using a built-in file viewer powered by UDOC.js. Users can open any .eps file from the file browser and see a rendered preview without leaving the platform.
features.evidence_summary: The sole registered function (fileViewer role, extension 'eps'), the readme, the UDOC.js credits, and the initial-release changelog entry all directly describe the same single capability: in-platform EPS rendering.
